glosses.ja: 興奮させる; 刺激する

sentences.target: Tu excites le chien en criant.

translations.fr: Tu excites le chien en criant.
translations.en: You get the dog riled up by shouting.
translations.de: Du regst den Hund durchs Schreien auf.
translations.zh-Hans: 你喊叫会把狗弄得很兴奋。
translations.yue: 你大嗌會令隻狗好興奮。
translations.pt: Você deixa o cachorro agitado ao gritar.
translations.he: אתה מעורר את הכלב כשאתה צועק.
translations.vi: Bạn hét làm con chó kích động.
translations.nl: Je maakt de hond wild door te schreeuwen.
translations.hi: तुम चिल्लाकर कुत्ते को उत्तेजित कर देते हो.
translations.nb: Du gjør hunden oppjaget ved å rope.
translations.id: Kamu membuat anjing jadi heboh dengan berteriak.
translations.sv: Du gör hunden uppjagad genom att skrika.
translations.da: Du får hunden op at køre ved å råbe.
translations.ja: あなたが叫ぶと犬が興奮する。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular informal.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular, agreeing with 'Tu'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'chien'.
Common noun, masculine singular, direct object of 'excites'.
Preposition introducing a gerund-participle to express manner ('en criant' = by/while shouting).
Present participle (gerund-participle) of 'crier', expressing a concomitant action.

sentences.target: Vous excitez trop les enfants avant le dîner.
sentences.reading: /vu ɛk.si.te tʁo lez ɑ̃.fɑ̃ a.vɑ̃ lə di.ne/

translations.fr: Vous excitez trop les enfants avant le dîner.
translations.ipa: /vu ɛk.si.te tʁo lez ɑ̃.fɑ̃ a.vɑ̃ lə di.ne/
translations.en: You rile up the kids too much before dinner.
translations.es: Alborotas demasiado a los niños antes de la cena.
translations.de: Ihr regt die Kinder vor dem Abendessen zu sehr auf.
translations.it: Agitate troppo i bambini prima di cena.
translations.ko: 저녁 먹기 전에 아이들을 너무 들뜨게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们在晚饭前把孩子弄得太兴奋了。
translations.yue: 你哋喺晚飯前令啲小朋友太興奮。
translations.ru: Вы слишком заводите детей перед ужином.
translations.pt: Vocês deixam as crianças animadas demais antes do jantar.
translations.he: אתם מלהיבים את הילדים יותר מדי לפני ארוחת ערב.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeğinden önce çocukları fazla coşturuyorsunuz.
translations.vi: Các bạn làm bọn trẻ quá kích động trước bữa tối.
translations.ar: أنتم تُهيّجون الأطفال كثيرًا قبل العشاء.
translations.nl: Jullie maken de kinderen te druk voor het avondeten.
translations.uk: Ви надто заводите дітей перед вечерею.
translations.hu: Túlzottan felhergelitek a gyerekeket vacsora előtt.
translations.hi: आप रात के खाने से पहले बच्चों को बहुत ज़्यादा उकसा देते हैं.
translations.pl: Za bardzo nakręcacie dzieci przed kolacją.
translations.el: Ξεσηκώνετε υπερβολικά τα παιδιά πριν το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Dere gjør barna altfor oppjaget før middag.
translations.id: Kalian membuat anak-anak terlalu heboh sebelum makan malam.
translations.sv: Ni gör barnen alldeles för uppjagade före middagen.
translations.ro: Îi agitați prea tare pe copii înainte de cină.
translations.da: I får børnene alt for op at køre før aftensmad.
translations.fi: Te saatte lapset liian innostuneiksi ennen illallista.
translations.ja: あなたたちは夕食前に子どもたちを盛り上げすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural or formal singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural, agreeing with 'Vous'.
Adverb of degree modifying the verb ('excitez').
Definite article, plural, introducing 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural, direct object of 'excitez'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: Il excite tout le monde avec ses blagues.
sentences.reading: /il ɛk.sit tu lə mɔ̃d a.vɛk se blag/

translations.fr: Il excite tout le monde avec ses blagues.
translations.ipa: /il ɛk.sit tu lə mɔ̃d a.vɛk se blag/
translations.en: He gets everyone worked up with his jokes.
translations.es: Él anima a todos con sus chistes.
translations.de: Er reißt mit seinen Witzen alle mit.
translations.it: Con le sue battute mette tutti su di giri.
translations.zh-Hans: 他用笑话把大家都带动起来。
translations.yue: 佢嘅笑話令大家都興奮起嚟。
translations.pt: Ele deixa todo mundo animado com suas piadas.
translations.he: הוא מלהיב את כולם עם הבדיחות שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy khiến mọi người phấn khích bằng những câu đùa của mình.
translations.nl: Hij maakt iedereen enthousiast met zijn grappen.
translations.hi: वह अपने चुटकुलों से सबको उत्साहित कर देता है.
translations.el: Με τα αστεία του ξεσηκώνει τους πάντες.
translations.nb: Han får alle i gang med vitsene sine.
translations.id: Dia membuat semua orang jadi bersemangat dengan leluconnya.
translations.sv: Han får alla att bli uppspelta med sina skämt.
translations.ro: Îi pune pe toți în vervă cu glumele lui.
translations.da: Han får alle op at køre med sine vitser.
translations.ja: 彼は冗談でみんなを盛り上げる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'Il'.
Determiner quantifying 'monde' in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' (= everyone).
Definite article, introducing 'monde'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of 'tout le monde', direct object of 'excite'.
Preposition introducing a means/instrumental complement.
Possessive determiner (3rd person), agreeing with the plural noun 'blagues'.
Common noun, plural, object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: J'aime exciter la foule au concert.

translations.fr: J'aime exciter la foule au concert.
translations.en: I like hyping up the crowd at concerts.
translations.es: Me gusta animar al público en los conciertos.
translations.de: Ich heize bei Konzerten gern die Menge an.
translations.it: Mi piace caricare il pubblico ai concerti.
translations.ko: 콘서트에서 관객을 신나게 하는 걸 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢在演唱会上带动观众的气氛。
translations.yue: 我鍾意喺演唱會帶動觀眾。
translations.ru: Мне нравится заводить толпу на концертах.
translations.pt: Eu gosto de animar a plateia nos shows.
translations.he: אני אוהב להלהיב את הקהל בהופעות.
translations.vi: Tôi thích khuấy động đám đông ở các buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.ar: أحبّ إشعال حماس الجمهور في الحفلات.
translations.nl: Ik houd ervan om het publiek op concerten op te peppen.
translations.uk: Мені подобається заводити натовп на концертах.
translations.hu: Szeretek felpörgetni a közönséget a koncerteken.
translations.hi: मुझे कॉन्सर्ट में भीड़ को जोश में लाना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να ξεσηκώνω το κοινό στις συναυλίες.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å få publikum opp i stemning på konserter.
translations.id: Saya suka menyemangati penonton di konser.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att peppa publiken på konserter.
translations.ro: Îmi place să înfierбânt mulțimea la concerte.
translations.da: Jeg kan lide at få publikum op at køre til koncerter.
translations.ja: コンサートで観客を盛り上げるのが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular, taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'aime'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'foule'.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object of 'exciter'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the article 'le', introducing the locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition 'au'.
